businesses.heroSubheading: Premium hair care, hair painting, styling, and texturizing services in a modern, inclusive space.

seo.metaTitle: Chic Cuts - Luxury Hair Salon & Color Specialists
seo.metaDescription: Book top hair treatments, balayage, cut and styling at Chic Cuts Austin.

businesses.contactAddress: 452 Premium Blvd, Suite C, Austin TX
businesses.heroHeading: Revitalize Your Hair, Express Your Personal Style
businesses.name: Chic Cuts Hair Salon
businesses.aboutText: Founded in 2020, Chic Cuts is dedicated to high-end hair transformations. Our certified color specialists use state-of-the-art formulations to keep your hair healthy, bright, and resilient.

At Vivid Nails, hygiene and custom detail-driven art are our priorities. We offer high-performance organic products, custom gel painting, and sensory pedicure paths under strict medical-grade sterilization.
businesses.name: Vivid Nails & Spa
businesses.heroHeading: Exquisite Nail Artistry & Organic Spa Pampering

seo.metaTitle: Vivid Nails - Advanced Nail Artistry & Hand Spa
seo.metaDescription: Book certified polygel extensions and customized manicure gel styling.

businesses.heroSubheading: Treat yourself to precision manicures, customized polygel extensions, and botanical foot therapies.

businesses.aboutText: Ink & Steel is an advanced, sterile studio focusing on bespoke, story-led body art. Every piece is meticulously customized, respecting high-end sanitary norms and absolute artistic integrity.
businesses.name: Ink & Steel Tattoo Studio

seo.metaDescription: Premier Brooklyn custom tattoo consultations and sterile body art.
seo.metaTitle: Ink & Steel - Bespoke Linework & Illustrative Tattoos

businesses.heroSubheading: Fine-line, modern illustrative realism, and blackwork tattoos from accredited award-winning resident artists.

businesses.aboutText: At Business1, we hold our craft with professional rigor, blending premium materials with experienced attention to detail.
businesses.name: Business1
businesses.heroSubheading: Bespoke Hair & Barber customized precisely around you.

services.description: Seamless, hand-painted balayage lighting with full structural plex reconstruction. Includes wash, scalp massage, and blowout.
services.name: Premium Balayage & Olaplex

services.description: Artistic hair profile mapping, texturizing, structural style restoration, and hydration masks.
services.name: Designer Cut & Customized Treatment

services.description: Exfoliating wash, micro-steam hydration infusion, tea tree scalp cleanse, and essential oil sensory therapy.
services.name: Scalp Hydromassage & Botanical Restructure

services.description: Nailbed structure analysis, tip extension, advanced sculpture, and custom fine-art hand painted graphics.
services.name: Bespoke Gel Painting & Hard Gel Full Set
Matcha Botanical Hand & Arm Spa
services.description: Warm matcha herbal bath clean, Dead sea salt mineral scrub, paraffin moisture wax wrap, and rose oil massage.
One-on-one session with our master, visual mood boarding, reference mapping, sketching layout, and skin placement test.
services.name: Custom Tattoo Conception Session

services.description: Active tattooing of fine-line design, micro-realism portrait matching, or elegant modern lettering up to 4 inches. Includes bio-protection patch.
services.name: Fine Line Illustrative Session (Small/Medium)

customers.name: Alex Mercer
customers.notes: Enjoys warm chamomile tea, prefers cold air blower.
Prefers extreme stiletto nails with heavy glitter.
customers.name: Brittany Spears

customers.notes: Getting half sleeve design mapping soon.
customers.name: Vince Taylor
